_doc:
Chapter 1 evidence cards. New file per PROPOSAL_player_driven_argument.md §3. Each entry is a piece of evidence the player can surface during Beat 4 (binder) through Beat 9 (archive research). 'Surfacing' means reading the corresponding evidence card via dialogue (Crab/Murrow lines), the v2 binder UI, or item pickup. Surfaced evidence is consumed by (a) the argument-frame proposal in crab.json's synthesis options block, (b) the v2 binder UI's evidence panel, and (c) the future court-round controller during Phase 1 Present actions.

Two-pass authoring per AGENTS.md §Casebook authoring. Code owns: id, source, discovered_when, argument_tags, context_tags, sets_flag. Design owns: display_name, summary, press_lines, present_lines.

Schema:
  evidence: { <evidence_id>: {
    display_name (Design — short noun phrase),
    summary (Design — one-line description),
    source (Code — where the card surfaces: 'binder_page_<n>' / 'archive_<doc_id>' / 'witness_<npc_id>' / 'item_<item_id>'),
    discovered_when (Code — a dialogue-runner trigger predicate; when true, the card becomes surfaceable),
    sets_flag (Code — chapter1 flag flipped true on surfacing; the binder_read_* and bonus-evidence flags are the v1 set),
    argument_tags (Code — principle_tags from data/tag_taxonomy.json),
    context_tags (Code — context_tags from data/tag_taxonomy.json),
    press_lines (Design — what Cula sees/says when reading the card),
    present_lines (Design — what Cula says when presenting this card in court; one per court-round opening_statement it's relevant to)
  } }
_owner_code: id, source, discovered_when, sets_flag, argument_tags, context_tags

renumbering_2015_fact._status: Code-pass complete; Design text pending. The renumbering is not a document; it's an observation about the building. Surfaceable via Crab's stairwell observation OR by reading the binder cross-reference. Either path sets binder_read_renumbering.

wojcik_witness_statement._status: Hydrated from data/items.json. Surfaced by halina.json client_meeting_r0_response_high / client_meeting_r1_response_high. Bonus evidence — sympathetic-stance carrier.

return_to_sender_slip._status: Hydrated from data/items.json. Surfaced by halina.json client_meeting_r0_response_blunt / client_meeting_r1_response_high. Bonus evidence — blunt-procedural-stance carrier; also volunteered on high-trust r1 from any stance.

lease_1962_inheritance_1987._status: Hydrated from data/items.json. Surfaced by halina.json client_meeting_r0_response_technical. Bonus evidence — technical-stance carrier.

landlord_contact._status: Hydrated from halina.json client_meeting_r2_response_high. Bonus evidence — high-trust reveal. Surfacing also flips chapter1.landlord_tip_received; seeds Ch4 landlord-intimidation thread.

rights_memo_article_6._status: Hydrated from data/items.json (rights_memo). The fair-hearing companion to the procedural binder; surfaced via Whimsy at Café Paragraf.
